name: Dental Care
shortDescription: General dental services including check-ups, cleaning, fillings, and emergency tooth pain treatment.
fullDescription: Our Dental Care service provides general dentistry for patients of all ages. Our qualified dentist handles routine check-ups and cleanings, cavity fillings, tooth extractions, emergency dental pain treatment, and basic cosmetic procedures. We use modern dental equipment and follow strict sterilization protocols to ensure a safe and comfortable experience.
